title: neochilenia aspillagae
intro: Neochilenia aspillagae, also known as the Chilensis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat fever, inflammation, and infections, and are said to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Neochilenia aspillagae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
